title: Ambient HUD
description: Replaces Minecraft's HUD with a minimal, context-sensitive interface
body:
### Ambient HUD - a rework of Minecraft's default interface. 
If you're willing to trade some familiar information for a cleaner, more immersive experience- this mod is for you.

New Hotbar Appears only when you interact with it: scrolling or pressing a hotkey. Can be positioned on the left, right, or top of the screen. By default hides all slots except one empty slot for easier scrolling - any slot is still reachable with its hotkey.

![new hotbar on top](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fdbde0daad6dd6a30950b3a47f9c809b4bf9a5a.gif)

### Offhand
Holding the offhand key brings up the hotbar and lets you move any item directly into the offhand slot - no extra scrolling needed.

![off hand hotbar on left](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15f4fea2ab0a511e5e515be408e15530c3cdedf7.gif)


### Pickup Notifications 
When you pick up an item, the slot it landed in gets highlighted - or a notification appears if it went into your inventory.

![when you picked up the item hotbar show that](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd4337533c7e02597ccb8fb7c6c02d790d4f4080.gif)

### Core Indicators 
Health, hunger, and air only show when they're not full. The XP bar is always visible by default.

![health bar and food bar working together!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51e2cf80bbff59fc04a954827877c7cfdbaaa668.gif)

**Boss Bar** Optionally suppresses pickup notifications during boss fights. Picks up the color of the vanilla boss bar.

### Optional Indicators 
Mana and stamina work only when a compatible mod is installed and are detected automatically. The source mod can also be set manually if needed.

![Stamina and mana are designed in the same style as health](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2345d5097075ea8b37907f64a1e6896bdb7d57ce.gif)

### Integrations

- Irons Spells & Spellbooks - mana (disable the original mana bar in its config)
- Ars Nouveau - mana (the original bar can be pushed offscreen)
- Epic Fight - stamina (original stamina bar is hidden automatically)
- Parcool - stamina (original stamina bar is~~~~ hidden automatically


### level up notification
The level is hidden by default, and when you level up, you'll see a toast like in RPG games.
![The level is hidden by default, and when you level up, you'll see a toast like in RPG games.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c7d5265fbb6e8a0612a6ada09c8037b6630fd86_0.webp)

**Configuration**
All elements of Ambient HUD can be disabled to restore their vanilla counterparts.
